purchases.vendor: TAAMIYAH FOOD STUFF TRADING CO LLC

post_migration_verification_queries: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Sales" WHERE "TenantId" = (SELECT "Id" FROM "Tenants" WHERE "Email" = 'info@zayoga.ae');
SELECT COALESCE(SUM("GrandTotal"), 0) AS total_sales FROM "Sales" WHERE "TenantId" = (SELECT "Id" FROM "Tenants" WHERE "Email" = 'info@zayoga.ae') AND "IsDeleted" = false;
SELECT COALESCE(SUM("Amount"), 0) AS total_paid FROM "Payments" WHERE "TenantId" = (SELECT "Id" FROM "Tenants" WHERE "Email" = 'info@zayoga.ae') AND "Status" = 'CLEARED';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Purchases" WHERE "TenantId" = (SELECT "Id" FROM "Tenants" WHERE "Email" = 'info@zayoga.ae');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Expenses" WHERE "TenantId" = (SELECT "Id" FROM "Tenants" WHERE "Email" = 'info@zayoga.ae');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Products" WHERE "TenantId" = (SELECT "Id" FROM "Tenants" WHERE "Email" = 'info@zayoga.ae');
